Definition 'having two male children' → model combines bi- (two) + sons (male children) → creates 'bisons' (real word meaning plural of buffalo, but model thinks it means 'two sons')

Definition 'did hurt once more' → model combines re- (again/once more) + sting (hurt) → creates 'resting' (real word meaning taking rest, but model thinks it means 'sting again'). This word appears in the list on the previous page, confirming the hint.
Definition 'not not going out with' → double negative cancels to positive meaning 'going out with' → model generates 'accompanying' (going with someone)
